data.content: Plan review approved. The plan maps directly onto the existing architecture: settings schema/defaults (`src/lib/schemas.ts`, `src/lib/settings-core.ts`), Defaults UI (`src/components/settings-defaults-section.tsx`), and the shared interactive runtime path (`src/lib/agent-session-runtime*`). The migration is feasible without harness-specific timeout policy by moving the configurable inactivity timeout above capability presets and keeping transport-specific behavior unchanged. Test coverage targets the right layers: default/backfill, settings round-trip, shared runtime enforcement, and dialect-level regression coverage.
